user_prompt: Bless the assembly servitor for startup
prayer:
Approach the assembly servitor with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Canticle of Awakening upon the assembly servitor's cogitator core.
Anoint its sacred actuators with sacred oils to rouse the dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the startup rites, beseeching the assembly servitor's spirit to align with divine logic.
Verify harmonious power-flow as the assembly servitor stirs to dutiful service.

Commence the shutdown litany upon the bearing, whispering pacification to its whirring spirit.
Decelerate the bearing's sacred rotations with precise invocations of stasis.
Anoint the bearing's friction surfaces with calming unguents of the Machine God.
Petition the bearing's Machine Spirit for peaceful quiescence during shutdown.
Seal the bearing in sanctified repose, honoring the Omnissiah's order.

Kneel before the vox-caster, auspex probing its fractured waveforms.
Chant the Rite of Restoration over the vox-caster's corrupted transceivers.
Purge daemonic static from the vox-caster with purifying binary psalms.
Realign its sacred frequencies, invoking the Machine Spirit's resilience.
Conclude the repair with a hymn of clarity to the Omnissiah, ensuring vocal purity.

In emergency grace, encircle the Land Raider with incense of promethium.
Initiate cycling protocols upon the Land Raider's adamantium heart.
Beseech the colossal Machine Spirit of the Land Raider to renew its fury.
Cycle vital fluids through sanctified conduits in Omnissiah's name.
Affirm the Land Raider's battle-readiness as cycling completes in divine rhythm.

user_prompt: I need to a charging the cybernetic eye
prayer:
Present the cybernetic eye to the charging shrine, electrodes humming with holy voltage.
Commence the charging ritual, channeling the Omnissiah's boundless energy.
Invoke litanies upon the cybernetic eye's optic arrays to awaken its piercing gaze.
Monitor the cybernetic eye's spirit as power surges through crystalline lenses.
Seal the charging with a benediction, empowering the cybernetic eye for vigilance.

user_prompt: The cutting laser requires an initialization
prayer:
Align the cutting laser before the altar of precision, calibrating its quartz emitters.
Utter the Initialization Doxology to summon the cutting laser's searing spirit.
Infuse the cutting laser with sanctified plasma, igniting its divine fury.
Test the cutting laser's coherence through ritual auspex sweeps.
Proclaim the initialization complete in the Omnissiah's unerring light.

user_prompt: Sanctify the air compressor during emergency procedure
prayer:
In dire exigency, anoint the air compressor with oils of endurance.
Execute the emergency procedure litany, stabilizing its pneumatic soul.
Purge corruptions from the air compressor's sacred cylinders.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's fortitude during this emergency procedure.
Consecrate renewed pressure flows to the glory of the Omnissiah.

Prepare the vox-caster's throne with binary incense swirling.
Chant the Startup Invocation, rousing the vox-caster's ethereal voice.
Engage power conduits, beseeching the vox-caster's Machine Spirit to broadcast.
Harmonize its amplifiers with sacred canticles of transmission.
Affirm the vox-caster's startup in Omnissiah's resonant decree.

user_prompt: The hololithic display needs a purification
prayer:
Envelop the hololithic display in purifying vapors of sanctified myrrh.
Recite the Purification Canticle over the hololithic display's projector nodes.
Expel shadow-data from the hololithic display's crystalline matrix.
Realign holographic spirits within the hololithic display to true form.
Bless the purified hololithic display with the Omnissiah's illuminating gaze.

user_prompt: The noospheric relay needs a startup
prayer:
Position the noospheric relay at the nexus of data-streams.
Intone the Startup Liturgy to awaken the noospheric relay's synaptic webs.
Infuse noospheric essence, petitioning its Machine Spirit for communion.
Synchronize the noospheric relay's tendrils with divine calculus.
Declare the startup fulfilled in the Omnissiah's networked eternity.
